content: Will you be able to reread Main Story Stages that you have previously completed within the Archive? Or will you need to go through the Main Story Stage again to read it another time?
There's a story difficulty next to the normal difficulty
Which is for just reading

Guys i dont know if i skiped anything or not but i ask here just to be sure rogers was the wealth boy the killer mr.wax kidnapped and the killer was training him to love his statues as his "son", but at some point this mr.wax dissapeard and rogers was rescue with the doll george, but i dont get it have rogers really killed mr.wax, was the effects of the D-slime or something else im not getting ?
did yiu finish the chap
because at the end they said what happened
I did sorry im slow to understand Stuff and i was focusing on so many things, so pls can you clear things for me pls
We have Caro hot lady
so basically
rogers did kill mr.max
wax
but it was because mr wax told him to kill him as a final test or smth
and then
rogers used mr wax's eyes
as georges eyes
so that mr wax is always with him
rogers basically replaced mr wax in the scultpors associsation
and there was a bit more, but i kinda forgor so
I think i might be mistaking cuz during the stage explorations we have an encounter with a boy at the stage
We kinda have options on how to deal with the situation and in the end if we accept the gift the item is called prostetic eyes
I dont understand whats the link betwin those encounters with the lore of the chapter
Thanks for the anwser, i guess rogers was a psycho even as a child
Oh, niko prob knows about it, i dont, all i know is that its sort of a event for stuff
Dont you remember that mr wax kidnapped him and basically turned rogers into a clone of him?
I mean yea i get the manipulation but i think there was a deeper reason why he choose rogers of many other easy targets i mean a wealth kid is not exacly an easy target
oh the events during exploration take place in a domain, which operate on unreality logic
in other words its half reality, half a reflection of the place's psyche (in this case, rogers and mr wax) and half nonlogical random stuff
consider it more a reflection of a part of rogers instead of something that actually happens, since relics are not diagetic
oh sounds like a good idea, ill go check thnx
but i suspect some events dont have pvs but will check the image order anyways
for more information about domains try checking out gramona's side story, where doll explains artificial domains
24's or sorel's side story is a better demonstration of how domains operate
So the kid we helped on the stage was a reflection of who rogers or mr.wax ? Cuz the boy seems much more normal than george or rogers
personally id guess rogers, since he was a socially awkward but otherwise normal kid before he got kidnapped
Well thanks alot for the anwsers i was starting to get crazy trying to relate the encounters with the the cutscenes
One more thing
Indeed

gorge is a wax doll with Mr wax's eyeballs. theres room to speculate that george isnt actually sentient, but instead rogers projecting his distorted memory of mr wax onto him
They hated him and wanted revenge

yeah what artistry said, the wax monster is sorta an accumulation of the d-rift mutations as well as the wrath of the max museum victims
